title: Hyper Punchy
description: Hyper Punchy is a animation feature for punchy
body:
![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd7e30a42d1fd63e0b5d9fd08b2479e3519ec97a.webp)
   

**The definitive ResourcePack for the Punchy experience.** ![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd7e30a42d1fd63e0b5d9fd08b2479e3519ec97a.webp)

**Overview** HyperPunchy aims to modernize standard animations and textures to provide a more fluid and responsive gameplay experience. It is specifically designed to improve visual feedback during high-paced combat and movement mechanics, ensuring every action feels impactful.
**Key Features** * **100+ Custom Animations:** A massive overhaul of the core experience with unique, handcrafted movements. * **Seamless Transitions:** Optimized animation states to prevent "snapping" and ensure a cohesive visual flow. * **Modernized Textures:** Polished visuals that maintain the classic Minecraft spirit while adding a modern touch. * **Future-Proof Design:** Optimized internal structure ready for upcoming complex animation updates.
> [!TIP] For the best experience, we recommend using **Iris/Oculus** and an up-to-date version of **Sodium**. ![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd7e30a42d1fd63e0b5d9fd08b2479e3519ec97a.webp)
    
***Also need to download this.*** Respackopts is required to configure pack settings.
![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd7e30a42d1fd63e0b5d9fd08b2479e3519ec97a.webp) ### License & Credits **License:** All Rights Reserved (ARR). Redistribution or modification without explicit permission is strictly prohibited. **Platform:** Designed specifically for the Modrinth community. HyperPunchy is an independent project created to enhance the "Punchy" experience.
